title: thelypteris rectangularis
intro: Thelypteris rectangularis, also known as the rectangular shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris rectangularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or a decoction for its herbal remedies, with some cultures using it to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and wounds.
